node.title: I suspect uber is just doing ghost hiring now

article.title: I suspect uber is just doing ghost hiring now
article.content: Obviously you can call me salty, but from what I have observed in my interview and also the results of the interviews of couple of my friends, it just seems like Uber is doing ghost hiring and their actual hiring is already complete. The interviewers will list down the minutest of the faults and quote them as the reason for non-selection, even though you had overall positive results in all of your interviews. What the HR tells you is that 'Bar is really high' but looks like the decision was already made. What are your thoughts ?

post.content: I would agree. For me, the very first (or the screening) round started half an hour late because the interviewer had changed. I started receiving calls from the recruiter even before my interview had ended (because he assumed that the interview would have ended according to the previously scheduled time). When it actually ended, I called him back and he mentioned that he tried to reach out to inform that I had cleared the screening round ! \nI was like what the hell, how is it even possible when the interview itself ended couple of minutes back xD \nI got rejected though in the following rounds, where I was asked a problem where the constraints provided by the interviewer did not even align with the optimal solution. Certainly something seems fishy.
